defensive.name: blockedShots
defensive.description: The number shots blocked by a defender.

defensive.name: effectiveClearance
defensive.description: The number of clearances that stops the attack of the opposing team.

defensive.name: effectiveTackles
defensive.description: The number of tackles where the player wins the ball.

defensive.name: inneffectiveTackles
defensive.description: The number of tackles where the player doesn't win the ball.

defensive.name: interceptions
defensive.description: The number of interceptions.

defensive.name: tacklePct
defensive.description: The perencentage of tackles where the player wins the ball.

defensive.name: totalClearance
defensive.description: The number of clearances attempted.

defensive.name: totalTackles
defensive.description: The number of tackles attempted.

defensive.name: possWonAtt3rd
defensive.description: Total number of times possession was regained in the attacking third of the field

defensive.name: possWonDef3rd
defensive.description: Total number of times possession was regained in the defensive third of the field

defensive.name: possWonMid3rd
defensive.description: Total number of times possession was regained in the midfield third of the field

defensive.name: ballRecovery
defensive.description: When a player takes possession of a loose ball, or switch of possession between teams when the ball is in open play

defensive.name: attemptsConcededIbox
defensive.description: An attempt conceded from a shot from inside the box

defensive.name: attemptsConcededObox
defensive.description: An attempt conceded from a shot from outside the box

defensive.name: ppda
defensive.description: Measures how many opposition passes a team allows before making a defensive action, indicating pressing intensity—lower values mean stronger pressing. Note: Calculation formula = opposition_passes / defensive_actions

defensive.name: fkFoulLost
defensive.description: All fouls by individual players, essentially counting all free kicks lost. It could be described as fouls conceded, fouls committed or free kicks conceded, they are practically equivalent (include penalties, and handballs)

defensive.name: challengeLost
defensive.description: Challenge that did not make contact, i.e. a missed challenge where the player was dribbled past (therefore, there cannot be a 'challengeWon' metric)

defensive.name: defensiveActions
defensive.description: Number of defensive moves made by the team in the defensive third

general.name: appearances
general.description: The number of times a player has made an appearance in a match.

general.name: avgRatingFromCorrespondent
general.description: The rating from a correspondent for a player.

general.name: avgRatingFromDataFeed
general.description: The rating from the data feed for a player.

general.name: avgRatingFromEditor
general.description: The rating from the editor(s) for a player.

general.name: avgRatingFromUser
general.description: The average user rating for a player.

general.name: dnp
general.description: The number of times a player did not play in a match.

general.name: draws
general.description: The number of times the scored ended even for both teams in a match and there was no extra time.

general.name: foulsCommitted
general.description: The number of fouls comitted by a player or team.

general.name: foulsSuffered
general.description: The number of fouls suffered by a player or team.

general.name: goalDifference
general.description: The difference of goals scored and goals conceded.

general.name: handBalls
general.description: The number of handball fouls committed..

general.name: losses
general.description: The number of times a team has lost a match.

general.name: lostCorners
general.description: The number of corners conceded to the opposing team.

general.name: minutes
general.description: The number of minutes played by a player.

general.name: ownGoals
general.description: The number of own goals conceded.

general.name: passPct
general.description: The percentage of passes that result in the ball finding its target.

general.name: redCards
general.description: The number of red cards that have been issued.

general.name: starts
general.description: The number of starts a player has made in matches.

general.name: subIns
general.description: The number of times a player has come on a sub in a match.

general.name: subOuts
general.description: The number of times a player has been subbed off in a match.

general.name: suspensions
general.description: The number of matches a player has been suspended.

general.name: timeEnded
general.description: The time a match ends.

general.name: timeStarted
general.description: The time a match starts.

general.name: winPct
general.description: The percentage of matches won.

general.name: wins
general.description: The number of matches won.

general.name: wonCorners
general.description: The number of corners won.

general.name: yellowCards
general.description: The number of yellow cards accumulated.

general.name: aerialsLost
general.description: Total number of duels where the ball is in the air and possession is lost

general.name: aerialsWon
general.description: Total number of duels where the ball is in the air and possession is won

general.name: duelsLost
general.description: Total number of duels over the possession of the ball where a player loses the ball - doesn't include 'overrun' situations where the attacking player takes on an opponent but the ball runs away from them out of play or to an opponent.

general.name: duelsWon
general.description: Total number of duels for possession of the ball where possession was won (aerial won + ground duels won)

general.name: groundDuelsWon
general.description: Total number of duels where possession is won and ball is on the ground; including total contests, total tackles, fouls, being fouled, dispossessions and lost challenges.

general.name: duels
general.description: Total number of direct player-on-player confrontations for possession of the ball (aerial + ground duels)

general.name: groundDuels
general.description: Total number of duels over possession where ball is on the ground; including total contests, total tackles, fouls, being fouled, dispossessions and lost challenges - doesn't include 'overrun' situations where the attacking player takes on an opponent but the ball runs away from them out of play or to an opponent.

general.name: duelWinPct
general.description: The percentage of duels won.

general.name: wonContest
general.description: Total dribbles where a team player beats an opponent – no over-runs or defensive 1v1s

general.name: totalContest
general.description: A dribble past a player is attempted (contests always involve two players) – it does not include 'overrun' situations (where the attacking player takes on an opponent, but the ball runs away from them and then out of play or to an opponent) or 'defensive 1v1' situations (where the attacking player attempts a dribble but is stopped by the defender but without a tackle occurring)

general.name: touches
general.description: Total sum of a player's or team's on-the-ball events

general.name: aerialDuelPct
general.description: Percentage of aerial duels won against total contested duels.

defensive.name: attemptsConcededIbox

defensive.description: Goal conceded from a shot inside the box

defensive.name: ppda
defensive.description: Measures how many opposition passes a team allows before making a defensive action, indicating pressing intensity—lower values mean stronger pressing. Note: Calculation formula = opposition_passes / defensive_actions

defensive.name: fkFoulLost
defensive.description: All fouls by individual players, essentially counting all free kicks lost. It could be described as fouls conceded, fouls committed or free kicks conceded, they are practically equivalent (include penalties, and handballs)

defensive.name: challengeLost
defensive.description: Challenge that did not make contact, i.e. a missed challenge where the player was dribbled past (therefore, there cannot be a 'challengeWon' metric)

defensive.name: defensiveActions
defensive.description: Number of defensive moves made by the team in the defensive third

general.name: appearances
general.description: The number of times a player has made an appearance in a match.

general.description: The average user rating for a player.

general.name: dnp
general.description: The number of times a player did not play in a match.

general.name: draws
general.description: The number of times the scored ended even for both teams in a match and there was no extra time.

general.name: foulsCommitted
general.description: The number of fouls comitted by a player or team.

general.name: foulsSuffered
general.description: The number of fouls suffered by a player or team.

general.name: goalDifference
general.description: The difference of goals scored and goals conceded.

general.name: handBalls

general.description: The number of times a team has lost a match.

general.description: The number of minutes played by a player.

general.name: ownGoals
general.description: The number of own goals conceded.

general.description: The percentage of passes that result in the ball finding its target.

general.name: redCards
general.description: The number of red cards that have been issued.

general.description: The number of starts a player has made in matches.

general.description: The number of matches a player has been suspended.

general.name: timeEnded
general.description: The time a match ends.

general.name: winPct
general.description: The percentage of matches won.

general.name: wins
general.description: The number of matches won.

general.name: wonCorners
general.description: The number of corners won.

general.name: yellowCards
general.description: The number of yellow cards accumulated.

general.name: aerialsLost
general.description: Total number of duels where the ball is in the air and possession is lost

general.name: aerialsWon
general.description: Total number of duels where the ball is in the air and possession is won

general.name: duelsLost
general.description: Total number of duels over the possession of the ball where a player loses the ball - doesn't include 'overrun' situations where the attacking player takes on an opponent but the ball runs away from them out of play or to an opponent.

general.name: duelsWon
general.description: Total number of duels for possession of the ball where possession was won (aerial won + ground duels won)

general.name: groundDuelsWon
general.description: Total number of duels where possession is won and ball is on the ground; including total contests, total tackles, fouls, being fouled, dispossessions and lost challenges.

general.name: duels
general.description: Total number of direct player-on-player confrontations for possession of the ball (aerial + ground duels)

general.name: groundDuels
general.description: Total number of duels over possession where ball is on the ground; including total contests, total tackles, fouls, being fouled, dispossessions and lost challenges - doesn't include 'overrun' situations where the attacking player takes on an opponent but the ball runs away from them out of play or to an opponent.

general.name: duelWinPct
general.description: The percentage of duels won.

general.name: wonContest
general.description: Total dribbles where a team player beats an opponent – no over-runs or defensive 1v1s

general.name: totalContest
general.description: A dribble past a player is attempted (contests always involve two players) – it does not include 'overrun' situations (where the attacking player takes on an opponent, but the ball runs away from them and then out of play or to an opponent) or 'defensive 1v1' situations (where the attacking player attempts a dribble but is stopped by the defender but without a tackle occurring)

general.name: touches
general.description: Total sum of a player's or team's on-the-ball events

general.name: aerialDuelPct
general.description: Percentage of aerial duels won against total contested duels.

offensive.description: A pass where the ball moves from outside the final third into the final third

offensive.name: penAreaEntries

offensive.name: successfulFinalThirdPasses
offensive.description: Total number of successful passes where the ball ends in the final third of the pitch (excludes throw-ins, keeper throws, and crosses)

offensive.name: totalFinalThirdPasses
offensive.description: Total number of passes (successful or unsuccessful) where ball ends in the final third of the pitch (excludes throw-ins, keeper throws, and crosses)

offensive.name: touchesInOppBox
offensive.description: Total touches inside the penalty area of the opposition

offensive.name: attemptsIbox
offensive.description: An attempted shot from inside the box

offensive.name: attemptsObox
offensive.description: An attempted shot from outside the box

offensive.name: dispossessed
offensive.description: A player in possession gets tackled by an opposition player when they are not attempting to dribble past (attempted take on) an opposition player.

offensive.name: unsuccessfulTouch
offensive.description: A player only touched the ball and lost possession – bad control

offensive.name: fouledFinalThird
offensive.description: A foul that occurs in the final third of the pitch (in relation to the attacking player's final third, ie attacking third)

offensive.name: accurateThrows
offensive.description: All accurate throw-ins

defensive.name: blockedShots

defensive.description: The number of tackles attempted.

defensive.description: Total number of times possession was regained in the attacking third of the field

defensive.name: possWonDef3rd
defensive.description: Total number of times possession was regained in the defensive third of the field

defensive.name: possWonMid3rd
defensive.description: Total number of times possession was regained in the midfield third of the field

defensive.name: ballRecovery
defensive.description: When a player takes possession of a loose ball, or switch of possession between teams when the ball is in open play

defensive.name: attemptsConcededIbox
defensive.description: An attempt conceded from a shot from inside the box

defensive.name: attemptsConcededObox
defensive.description: An attempt conceded from a shot from outside the box

defensive.name: goalsConcededIbox
defensive.description: Goal conceded from a shot inside the box

defensive.name: ppda
defensive.description: Measures how many opposition passes a team allows before making a defensive action, indicating pressing intensity—lower values mean stronger pressing. Note: Calculation formula = opposition_passes / defensive_actions

defensive.name: fkFoulLost
defensive.description: All fouls by individual players, essentially counting all free kicks lost. It could be described as fouls conceded, fouls committed or free kicks conceded, they are practically equivalent (include penalties, and handballs)

defensive.name: challengeLost
defensive.description: Challenge that did not make contact, i.e. a missed challenge where the player was dribbled past (therefore, there cannot be a 'challengeWon' metric)

defensive.name: defensiveActions
defensive.description: Number of defensive moves made by the team in the defensive third

general.name: appearances
general.description: The number of times a player has made an appearance in a match.

general.name: avgRatingFromCorrespondent
general.description: The rating from a correspondent for a player.

general.name: avgRatingFromDataFeed
general.description: The rating from the data feed for a player.

general.name: avgRatingFromEditor
general.description: The rating from the editor(s) for a player.

general.name: avgRatingFromUser
general.description: The average user rating for a player.

general.name: dnp
general.description: The number of times a player did not play in a match.

general.name: draws
general.description: The number of times the scored ended even for both teams in a match and there was no extra time.

general.name: foulsCommitted
general.description: The number of fouls comitted by a player or team.

general.name: foulsSuffered
general.description: The number of fouls suffered by a player or team.

general.name: goalDifference
general.description: The difference of goals scored and goals conceded.

general.name: handBalls
general.description: The number of handball fouls committed..

general.name: losses
general.description: The number of times a team has lost a match.

general.name: lostCorners
general.description: The number of corners conceded to the opposing team.

general.name: minutes
general.description: The number of minutes played by a player.

general.name: ownGoals
general.description: The number of own goals conceded.

general.name: passPct
general.description: The percentage of passes that result in the ball finding its target.

general.name: redCards
general.description: The number of red cards that have been issued.

general.name: starts
general.description: The number of starts a player has made in matches.

general.name: subIns
general.description: The number of times a player has come on a sub in a match.

general.name: subOuts
general.description: The number of times a player has been subbed off in a match.

general.name: suspensions
general.description: The number of matches a player has been suspended.

general.name: timeEnded
general.description: The time a match ends.

general.name: timeStarted
general.description: The time a match starts.

general.name: winPct
general.description: The percentage of matches won.

general.name: wins
general.description: The number of matches won.

general.name: wonCorners
general.description: The number of corners won.

general.name: yellowCards
general.description: The number of yellow cards accumulated.

general.name: aerialsLost
general.description: Total number of duels where the ball is in the air and possession is lost

general.name: aerialsWon
general.description: Total number of duels where the ball is in the air and possession is won

general.name: duelsLost
general.description: Total number of duels over the possession of the ball where a player loses the ball - doesn't include 'overrun' situations where the attacking player takes on an opponent but the ball runs away from them out of play or to an opponent.

general.name: duelsWon
general.description: Total number of duels for possession of the ball where possession was won (aerial won + ground duels won)

general.name: groundDuelsWon
general.description: Total number of duels where possession is won and ball is on the ground; including total contests, total tackles, fouls, being fouled, dispossessions and lost challenges.

general.name: duels
general.description: Total number of direct player-on-player confrontations for possession of the ball (aerial + ground duels)

general.name: groundDuels
general.description: Total number of duels over possession where ball is on the ground; including total contests, total tackles, fouls, being fouled, dispossessions and lost challenges - doesn't include 'overrun' situations where the attacking player takes on an opponent but the ball runs away from them out of play or to an opponent.

general.name: duelWinPct
general.description: The percentage of duels won.

general.name: wonContest
general.description: Total dribbles where a team player beats an opponent – no over-runs or defensive 1v1s

general.name: totalContest
general.description: A dribble past a player is attempted (contests always involve two players) – it does not include 'overrun' situations (where the attacking player takes on an opponent, but the ball runs away from them and then out of play or to an opponent) or 'defensive 1v1' situations (where the attacking player attempts a dribble but is stopped by the defender but without a tackle occurring)

general.name: touches
general.description: Total sum of a player's or team's on-the-ball events

general.name: aerialDuelPct
general.description: Percentage of aerial duels won against total contested duels.

defensive.description: Challenge that did not make contact, i.e. a missed challenge where the player was dribbled past (therefore, there cannot be a 'challengeWon' metric)

defensive.name: defensiveActions
defensive.description: Number of defensive moves made by the team in the defensive third

general.name: appearances
general.description: The number of times a player has made an appearance in a match.

general.name: avgRatingFromCorrespondent
general.description: The rating from a correspondent for a player.

general.name: avgRatingFromDataFeed
general.description: The rating from the data feed for a player.

general.name: avgRatingFromEditor
general.description: The rating from the editor(s) for a player.

general.name: avgRatingFromUser
general.description: The average user rating for a player.

general.name: dnp
general.description: The number of times a player did not play in a match.

general.name: draws
general.description: The number of times the scored ended even for both teams in a match and there was no extra time.

general.name: foulsCommitted
general.description: The number of fouls comitted by a player or team.

general.name: foulsSuffered
general.description: The number of fouls suffered by a player or team.

general.name: goalDifference
general.description: The difference of goals scored and goals conceded.

general.name: handBalls
general.description: The number of handball fouls committed..

general.name: losses
general.description: The number of times a team has lost a match.

general.name: lostCorners
general.description: The number of corners conceded to the opposing team.

general.name: minutes
general.description: The number of minutes played by a player.

general.name: ownGoals
general.description: The number of own goals conceded.

general.name: passPct
general.description: The percentage of passes that result in the ball finding its target.

general.name: redCards
general.description: The number of red cards that have been issued.

general.name: starts
general.description: The number of starts a player has made in matches.

general.name: subIns
general.description: The number of times a player has come on a sub in a match.

general.name: subOuts
general.description: The number of times a player has been subbed off in a match.

general.name: suspensions
general.description: The number of matches a player has been suspended.

general.name: timeEnded
general.description: The time a match ends.

general.name: timeStarted
general.description: The time a match starts.

general.name: winPct
general.description: The percentage of matches won.

general.name: wins
general.description: The number of matches won.

general.name: wonCorners
general.description: The number of corners won.

general.name: yellowCards
general.description: The number of yellow cards accumulated.

general.name: aerialsLost
general.description: Total number of duels where the ball is in the air and possession is lost

general.name: aerialsWon
general.description: Total number of duels where the ball is in the air and possession is won

general.name: duelsLost
general.description: Total number of duels over the possession of the ball where a player loses the ball - doesn't include 'overrun' situations where the attacking player takes on an opponent but the ball runs away from them out of play or to an opponent.

general.name: duelsWon
general.description: Total number of duels for possession of the ball where possession was won (aerial won + ground duels won)

general.name: groundDuelsWon
general.description: Total number of duels where possession is won and ball is on the ground; including total contests, total tackles, fouls, being fouled, dispossessions and lost challenges.

general.name: duels
general.description: Total number of direct player-on-player confrontations for possession of the ball (aerial + ground duels)

general.name: groundDuels
general.description: Total number of duels over possession where ball is on the ground; including total contests, total tackles, fouls, being fouled, dispossessions and lost challenges - doesn't include 'overrun' situations where the attacking player takes on an opponent but the ball runs away from them out of play or to an opponent.

general.name: duelWinPct
general.description: The percentage of duels won.

general.name: wonContest
general.description: Total dribbles where a team player beats an opponent – no over-runs or defensive 1v1s

general.name: totalContest
general.description: A dribble past a player is attempted (contests always involve two players) – it does not include 'overrun' situations (where the attacking player takes on an opponent, but the ball runs away from them and then out of play or to an opponent) or 'defensive 1v1' situations (where the attacking player attempts a dribble but is stopped by the defender but without a tackle occurring)

general.name: touches
general.description: Total sum of a player's or team's on-the-ball events

general.name: aerialDuelPct
general.description: Percentage of aerial duels won against total contested duels.

offensive.name: expectedAssists
offensive.description: Total Expected Assists

offensive.name: expectedAssistsOpenPlay
offensive.description: Total Expected Assists from open play

offensive.name: expectedAssistsSetPlay
offensive.description: Total Expected Assists from set pieces

offensive.name: expectedGoalsNonPenalty
offensive.description: Total Expected Goals excluding penalties

offensive.name: expectedGoalsOpenPlay
offensive.description: Total Expected Goals of all open play shots

offensive.name: expectedGoalsSetPlay
offensive.description: Total Expected Goals of all set play shots

offensive.name: onTargetPct
offensive.description: On Target Percentage

offensive.name: expectedGoalsOnTarget
offensive.description: Total Expected Goals on Target

offensive.name: expectedGoalsOnTargetNonPenalty
offensive.description: Total Expected Goals on Target excluding penalties

offensive.name: bigChanceCreated
offensive.description: A pass which led to a clear-cut scoring opportunity, such as a one-on-one situation or a shot from just a few yards out

offensive.name: bigChanceMissed
offensive.description: A clear-cut scoring opportunity which was not converted/scored

offensive.name: finalThirdEntries
offensive.description: A pass where the ball moves from outside the final third into the final third

offensive.name: penAreaEntries
offensive.description: A pass where the ball moves from outside to inside the penalty area

offensive.name: successfulFinalThirdPasses
offensive.description: Total number of successful passes where the ball ends in the final third of the pitch (excludes throw-ins, keeper throws, and crosses)

offensive.name: totalFinalThirdPasses
offensive.description: Total number of passes (successful or unsuccessful) where ball ends in the final third of the pitch (excludes throw-ins, keeper throws, and crosses)

offensive.name: touchesInOppBox
offensive.description: Total touches inside the penalty area of the opposition

offensive.name: attemptsIbox
offensive.description: An attempted shot from inside the box

offensive.name: attemptsObox
offensive.description: An attempted shot from outside the box

offensive.name: dispossessed
offensive.description: A player in possession gets tackled by an opposition player when they are not attempting to dribble past (attempted take on) an opposition player.

offensive.name: unsuccessfulTouch
offensive.description: A player only touched the ball and lost possession – bad control

offensive.name: fouledFinalThird
offensive.description: A foul that occurs in the final third of the pitch (in relation to the attacking player's final third, ie attacking third)

offensive.name: firstHalfGoals
offensive.description: The total number of goals scored in the first half of the match (total, both teams combined)

offensive.name: totalFastbreak
offensive.description: Total number of fast breaks that occurred

offensive.name: accurateThrows
offensive.description: All accurate throw-ins

offensive.name: totalThrows
offensive.description: Total number of throw-ins

offensive.name: totalBackZonePass
offensive.description: Total number of passes that end in the player's own half – excluding throw-ins and keeper throws

offensive.name: totalFwdZonePass
offensive.description: Total number of passes that end in the opposition half (includes crosses).

defensive.name: blockedShots
defensive.description: The number shots blocked by a defender.

defensive.name: effectiveClearance
defensive.description: The number of clearances that stops the attack of the opposing team.

defensive.name: effectiveTackles
defensive.description: The number of tackles where the player wins the ball.

defensive.name: inneffectiveTackles
defensive.description: The number of tackles where the player doesn't win the ball.

defensive.name: interceptions
defensive.description: The number of interceptions.

defensive.name: tacklePct
defensive.description: The perencentage of tackles where the player wins the ball.

defensive.name: totalClearance
defensive.description: The number of clearances attempted.

defensive.name: totalTackles
defensive.description: The number of tackles attempted.

defensive.name: possWonAtt3rd
defensive.description: Total number of times possession was regained in the attacking third of the field

defensive.name: possWonDef3rd
defensive.description: Total number of times possession was regained in the defensive third of the field

defensive.name: possWonMid3rd
defensive.description: Total number of times possession was regained in the midfield third of the field

defensive.name: ballRecovery
defensive.description: When a player takes possession of a loose ball, or switch of possession between teams when the ball is in open play

defensive.name: attemptsConcededIbox
defensive.description: An attempt conceded from a shot from inside the box

defensive.name: attemptsConcededObox
defensive.description: An attempt conceded from a shot from outside the box

defensive.name: goalsConcededIbox
defensive.description: Goal conceded from a shot inside the box

defensive.name: ppda
defensive.description: Measures how many opposition passes a team allows before making a defensive action, indicating pressing intensity—lower values mean stronger pressing. Note: Calculation formula = opposition_passes / defensive_actions

defensive.name: fkFoulLost
defensive.description: All fouls by individual players, essentially counting all free kicks lost. It could be described as fouls conceded, fouls committed or free kicks conceded, they are practically equivalent (include penalties, and handballs)

defensive.name: challengeLost
defensive.description: Challenge that did not make contact, i.e. a missed challenge where the player was dribbled past (therefore, there cannot be a 'challengeWon' metric)

defensive.name: defensiveActions
defensive.description: Number of defensive moves made by the team in the defensive third

general.name: appearances
general.description: The number of times a player has made an appearance in a match.

general.name: avgRatingFromCorrespondent
general.description: The rating from a correspondent for a player.

general.name: avgRatingFromDataFeed
general.description: The rating from the data feed for a player.

general.name: avgRatingFromEditor
general.description: The rating from the editor(s) for a player.

general.name: avgRatingFromUser
general.description: The average user rating for a player.

general.name: dnp
general.description: The number of times a player did not play in a match.

general.name: draws
general.description: The number of times the scored ended even for both teams in a match and there was no extra time.

general.name: foulsCommitted
general.description: The number of fouls comitted by a player or team.

general.name: foulsSuffered
general.description: The number of fouls suffered by a player or team.

general.name: goalDifference
general.description: The difference of goals scored and goals conceded.

general.name: handBalls
general.description: The number of handball fouls committed..

general.name: losses
general.description: The number of times a team has lost a match.

general.name: lostCorners
general.description: The number of corners conceded to the opposing team.

general.name: minutes
general.description: The number of minutes played by a player.

general.name: ownGoals
general.description: The number of own goals conceded.

general.name: passPct
general.description: The percentage of passes that result in the ball finding its target.

general.name: redCards
general.description: The number of red cards that have been issued.

general.name: starts
general.description: The number of starts a player has made in matches.

general.name: subIns
general.description: The number of times a player has come on a sub in a match.

general.name: subOuts
general.description: The number of times a player has been subbed off in a match.

general.name: suspensions
general.description: The number of matches a player has been suspended.

general.name: timeEnded
general.description: The time a match ends.

general.name: timeStarted
general.description: The time a match starts.

general.name: winPct
general.description: The percentage of matches won.

general.name: wins
general.description: The number of matches won.

general.name: wonCorners
general.description: The number of corners won.

general.name: yellowCards
general.description: The number of yellow cards accumulated.

general.name: aerialsLost
general.description: Total number of duels where the ball is in the air and possession is lost

general.name: aerialsWon
general.description: Total number of duels where the ball is in the air and possession is won

general.name: duelsLost
general.description: Total number of duels over the possession of the ball where a player loses the ball - doesn't include 'overrun' situations where the attacking player takes on an opponent but the ball runs away from them out of play or to an opponent.

general.name: duelsWon
general.description: Total number of duels for possession of the ball where possession was won (aerial won + ground duels won)

general.name: groundDuelsWon
general.description: Total number of duels where possession is won and ball is on the ground; including total contests, total tackles, fouls, being fouled, dispossessions and lost challenges.

general.name: duels
general.description: Total number of direct player-on-player confrontations for possession of the ball (aerial + ground duels)

general.name: groundDuels
general.description: Total number of duels over possession where ball is on the ground; including total contests, total tackles, fouls, being fouled, dispossessions and lost challenges - doesn't include 'overrun' situations where the attacking player takes on an opponent but the ball runs away from them out of play or to an opponent.

general.name: duelWinPct
general.description: The percentage of duels won.

general.name: wonContest
general.description: Total dribbles where a team player beats an opponent – no over-runs or defensive 1v1s

general.name: totalContest
general.description: A dribble past a player is attempted (contests always involve two players) – it does not include 'overrun' situations (where the attacking player takes on an opponent, but the ball runs away from them and then out of play or to an opponent) or 'defensive 1v1' situations (where the attacking player attempts a dribble but is stopped by the defender but without a tackle occurring)

general.name: touches
general.description: Total sum of a player's or team's on-the-ball events

general.name: aerialDuelPct
general.description: Percentage of aerial duels won against total contested duels.

goalKeeping.name: cleanSheet
goalKeeping.description: The number of times a goalkeeper doesn't let in a goal.

goalKeeping.name: crossesCaught
goalKeeping.description: The number of crosses claimed.

goalKeeping.name: goalsConceded
goalKeeping.description: The number of goals allowed by the goalkeeper.

goalKeeping.name: partialCleenSheet
goalKeeping.description: The number of times a clean sheet is kept when playing at least a part of the game.

goalKeeping.name: penaltyKickConceded
goalKeeping.description: The number of goals allowed when the opposing team take a penalty.

goalKeeping.name: penaltyKickSavePct
goalKeeping.description: The percentage of penalty kicks a goalkeeper saves.

goalKeeping.name: penaltyKicksFaced
goalKeeping.description: The number of penalty kicks faced by a goalkeeper.

goalKeeping.name: penaltyKicksSaved
goalKeeping.description: The number of penalty kicks saved by a goalkeeper.

goalKeeping.name: punches
goalKeeping.description: The number of punches.

goalKeeping.name: savePct
goalKeeping.description: The percentage of shots on target that are saved by a goalkeeper.

goalKeeping.name: saves
goalKeeping.description: The number of times a goalkeeper makes a save.

goalKeeping.name: shootOutKicksFaced
goalKeeping.description: The number of penalty kicks faced in a penalty shootout.

goalKeeping.name: shootOutKicksSaved
goalKeeping.description: The number of penalty kicks saved in a penalty shootout.

goalKeeping.name: shootOutSavePct
goalKeeping.description: The percentage of penalty kicks saved in a penalty shootout.

goalKeeping.name: shotsFaced
goalKeeping.description: The number of shots on target a goalkeeper has faced.

goalKeeping.name: smothers
goalKeeping.description: The number of smothers.

goalKeeping.name: unclaimedCrosses
goalKeeping.description: The number of crosses that were unclaimed.

goalKeeping.name: expectedGoalsConceded
goalKeeping.description: Total Expected Goals Against

goalKeeping.name: expectedGoalsNonPenaltyConceded
goalKeeping.description: Total Expected Goals Against excluding penalties

goalKeeping.name: expectedGoalsOnTargetConceded
goalKeeping.description: Total Expected Goals on Target Against

goalKeeping.name: expectedGoalsOnTargetNonPenaltyConceded
goalKeeping.description: Total Expected Goals on Target Against excluding penalties

goalKeeping.name: bigChanceSaves
goalKeeping.description: Count of major scoring chances saved by the player (usually goalkeepers)

goalKeeping.name: accurateKeeperSweeper
goalKeeping.description: Goalkeeper comes off their line, wins the ball and wins possession for their team

goalKeeping.name: totalKeeperSweeper
goalKeeping.description: Goalkeeper attempts to come off their line and win possession of the ball

goalKeeping.name: accurateGoalKicks
goalKeeping.description: Accurate goal kicks (from goalkeeper)

goalKeeping.name: accurateKeeperThrows
goalKeeping.description: Accurate throws from the goalkeeper in open play

goalKeeping.name: goalKicks
goalKeeping.description: Goalkeeper restarts play with a goal kick

goalKeeping.name: keeperThrows
goalKeeping.description: Goalkeeper throw-outs

goalKeeping.name: goalsPrevented
goalKeeping.description: The difference between goals on target and actual goals conceded by a goalkeeper.

goalKeeping.name: shotsOnGoalAgainst
goalKeeping.description: The number of shots on goal the opposing team has had against this team

defensive.description: Measures how many opposition passes a team allows before making a defensive action, indicating pressing intensity—lower values mean stronger pressing. Note: Calculation formula = opposition_passes / defensive_actions

defensive.name: fkFoulLost
defensive.description: All fouls by individual players, essentially counting all free kicks lost. It could be described as fouls conceded, fouls committed or free kicks conceded, they are practically equivalent (include penalties, and handballs)

defensive.description: Challenge that did not make contact, i.e. a missed challenge where the player was dribbled past (therefore, there cannot be a 'challengeWon' metric)

general.name: aerialsLost
general.description: Total number of duels where the ball is in the air and possession is lost

general.name: aerialsWon
general.description: Total number of duels where the ball is in the air and possession is won

general.name: duelsLost
general.description: Total number of duels over the possession of the ball where a player loses the ball - doesn't include 'overrun' situations where the attacking player takes on an opponent but the ball runs away from them out of play or to an opponent.

general.name: duelsWon
general.description: Total number of duels for possession of the ball where possession was won (aerial won + ground duels won)

general.name: groundDuelsWon
general.description: Total number of duels where possession is won and ball is on the ground; including total contests, total tackles, fouls, being fouled, dispossessions and lost challenges.

general.name: duels
general.description: Total number of direct player-on-player confrontations for possession of the ball (aerial + ground duels)

general.name: groundDuels
general.description: Total number of duels over possession where ball is on the ground; including total contests, total tackles, fouls, being fouled, dispossessions and lost challenges - doesn't include 'overrun' situations where the attacking player takes on an opponent but the ball runs away from them out of play or to an opponent.

general.name: duelWinPct
general.description: The percentage of duels won.

general.name: wonContest
general.description: Total dribbles where a team player beats an opponent – no over-runs or defensive 1v1s

general.name: totalContest
general.description: A dribble past a player is attempted (contests always involve two players) – it does not include 'overrun' situations (where the attacking player takes on an opponent, but the ball runs away from them and then out of play or to an opponent) or 'defensive 1v1' situations (where the attacking player attempts a dribble but is stopped by the defender but without a tackle occurring)

general.name: touches
general.description: Total sum of a player's or team's on-the-ball events

general.name: aerialDuelPct
general.description: Percentage of aerial duels won against total contested duels.

general.name: timeEnded
general.description: The time a match ends.

general.name: winPct
general.description: The percentage of matches won.

general.name: wonCorners
general.description: The number of corners won.

general.name: yellowCards
general.description: The number of yellow cards accumulated.

general.name: aerialsLost
general.description: Total number of duels where the ball is in the air and possession is lost

general.name: aerialsWon
general.description: Total number of duels where the ball is in the air and possession is won

general.name: duelsLost
general.description: Total number of duels over the possession of the ball where a player loses the ball - doesn't include 'overrun' situations where the attacking player takes on an opponent but the ball runs away from them out of play or to an opponent.

general.name: duelsWon
general.description: Total number of duels for possession of the ball where possession was won (aerial won + ground duels won)

general.name: groundDuelsWon
general.description: Total number of duels where possession is won and ball is on the ground; including total contests, total tackles, fouls, being fouled, dispossessions and lost challenges.

general.name: duels
general.description: Total number of direct player-on-player confrontations for possession of the ball (aerial + ground duels)

general.name: groundDuels
general.description: Total number of duels over possession where ball is on the ground; including total contests, total tackles, fouls, being fouled, dispossessions and lost challenges - doesn't include 'overrun' situations where the attacking player takes on an opponent but the ball runs away from them out of play or to an opponent.

general.name: duelWinPct
general.description: The percentage of duels won.

general.name: wonContest
general.description: Total dribbles where a team player beats an opponent – no over-runs or defensive 1v1s

general.name: totalContest
general.description: A dribble past a player is attempted (contests always involve two players) – it does not include 'overrun' situations (where the attacking player takes on an opponent, but the ball runs away from them and then out of play or to an opponent) or 'defensive 1v1' situations (where the attacking player attempts a dribble but is stopped by the defender but without a tackle occurring)

general.name: touches
general.description: Total sum of a player's or team's on-the-ball events

general.name: contentiousDecision
general.description: Any major talking point or error made by the referee

general.name: aerialDuelPct
general.description: Percentage of aerial duels won against total contested duels.

offensive.description: A foul that occurs in the final third of the pitch (in relation to the attacking player's final third, ie attacking third)

offensive.name: firstHalfGoals
offensive.description: The total number of goals scored in the first half of the match (total, both teams combined)

offensive.name: totalFastbreak
offensive.description: Total number of fast breaks that occurred

offensive.name: accurateThrows
offensive.description: All accurate throw-ins

offensive.name: totalThrows
offensive.description: Total number of throw-ins

offensive.name: totalBackZonePass
offensive.description: Total number of passes that end in the player's own half – excluding throw-ins and keeper throws

offensive.name: totalFwdZonePass
offensive.description: Total number of passes that end in the opposition half (includes crosses).

defensive.name: blockedShots
defensive.description: The number shots blocked by a defender.

defensive.name: effectiveClearance
defensive.description: The number of clearances that stops the attack of the opposing team.

defensive.name: effectiveTackles
defensive.description: The number of tackles where the player wins the ball.

defensive.name: inneffectiveTackles
defensive.description: The number of tackles where the player doesn't win the ball.

defensive.name: interceptions
defensive.description: The number of interceptions.

defensive.name: tacklePct
defensive.description: The perencentage of tackles where the player wins the ball.

defensive.name: totalClearance
defensive.description: The number of clearances attempted.

defensive.name: totalTackles
defensive.description: The number of tackles attempted.

defensive.name: possWonAtt3rd
defensive.description: Total number of times possession was regained in the attacking third of the field

defensive.name: possWonDef3rd
defensive.description: Total number of times possession was regained in the defensive third of the field

defensive.name: possWonMid3rd
defensive.description: Total number of times possession was regained in the midfield third of the field

defensive.name: ballRecovery
defensive.description: When a player takes possession of a loose ball, or switch of possession between teams when the ball is in open play

defensive.name: attemptsConcededIbox
defensive.description: An attempt conceded from a shot from inside the box

defensive.name: attemptsConcededObox
defensive.description: An attempt conceded from a shot from outside the box

defensive.name: goalsConcededIbox
defensive.description: Goal conceded from a shot inside the box

defensive.name: ppda
defensive.description: Measures how many opposition passes a team allows before making a defensive action, indicating pressing intensity—lower values mean stronger pressing. Note: Calculation formula = opposition_passes / defensive_actions

defensive.name: fkFoulLost
defensive.description: All fouls by individual players, essentially counting all free kicks lost. It could be described as fouls conceded, fouls committed or free kicks conceded, they are practically equivalent (include penalties, and handballs)

defensive.name: challengeLost
defensive.description: Challenge that did not make contact, i.e. a missed challenge where the player was dribbled past (therefore, there cannot be a 'challengeWon' metric)

defensive.name: defensiveActions
defensive.description: Number of defensive moves made by the team in the defensive third

general.name: appearances
general.description: The number of times a player has made an appearance in a match.

general.name: avgRatingFromCorrespondent
general.description: The rating from a correspondent for a player.

general.name: avgRatingFromDataFeed
general.description: The rating from the data feed for a player.

general.name: avgRatingFromEditor
general.description: The rating from the editor(s) for a player.

general.name: avgRatingFromUser
general.description: The average user rating for a player.

general.name: dnp
general.description: The number of times a player did not play in a match.

general.name: draws
general.description: The number of times the scored ended even for both teams in a match and there was no extra time.

general.name: foulsCommitted
general.description: The number of fouls comitted by a player or team.

general.name: foulsSuffered
general.description: The number of fouls suffered by a player or team.

general.name: goalDifference
general.description: The difference of goals scored and goals conceded.

general.name: handBalls
general.description: The number of handball fouls committed..

general.name: losses
general.description: The number of times a team has lost a match.

general.name: lostCorners
general.description: The number of corners conceded to the opposing team.

general.name: minutes
general.description: The number of minutes played by a player.

general.name: ownGoals
general.description: The number of own goals conceded.

general.name: passPct
general.description: The percentage of passes that result in the ball finding its target.

general.name: redCards
general.description: The number of red cards that have been issued.

general.name: starts
general.description: The number of starts a player has made in matches.

general.name: subIns
general.description: The number of times a player has come on a sub in a match.

general.name: subOuts
general.description: The number of times a player has been subbed off in a match.

general.name: suspensions
general.description: The number of matches a player has been suspended.

general.name: timeEnded
general.description: The time a match ends.

general.name: timeStarted
general.description: The time a match starts.

general.name: winPct
general.description: The percentage of matches won.

general.name: wins
general.description: The number of matches won.

general.name: wonCorners
general.description: The number of corners won.

general.name: yellowCards
general.description: The number of yellow cards accumulated.

general.name: aerialsLost
general.description: Total number of duels where the ball is in the air and possession is lost

general.name: aerialsWon
general.description: Total number of duels where the ball is in the air and possession is won

general.name: duelsLost
general.description: Total number of duels over the possession of the ball where a player loses the ball - doesn't include 'overrun' situations where the attacking player takes on an opponent but the ball runs away from them out of play or to an opponent.

general.name: duelsWon
general.description: Total number of duels for possession of the ball where possession was won (aerial won + ground duels won)

general.name: groundDuelsWon
general.description: Total number of duels where possession is won and ball is on the ground; including total contests, total tackles, fouls, being fouled, dispossessions and lost challenges.

general.name: duels
general.description: Total number of direct player-on-player confrontations for possession of the ball (aerial + ground duels)

general.name: groundDuels
general.description: Total number of duels over possession where ball is on the ground; including total contests, total tackles, fouls, being fouled, dispossessions and lost challenges - doesn't include 'overrun' situations where the attacking player takes on an opponent but the ball runs away from them out of play or to an opponent.

general.name: duelWinPct
general.description: The percentage of duels won.

general.name: wonContest
general.description: Total dribbles where a team player beats an opponent – no over-runs or defensive 1v1s

general.name: totalContest
general.description: A dribble past a player is attempted (contests always involve two players) – it does not include 'overrun' situations (where the attacking player takes on an opponent, but the ball runs away from them and then out of play or to an opponent) or 'defensive 1v1' situations (where the attacking player attempts a dribble but is stopped by the defender but without a tackle occurring)

general.name: touches
general.description: Total sum of a player's or team's on-the-ball events

general.name: aerialDuelPct
general.description: Percentage of aerial duels won against total contested duels.

offensive.name: fouledFinalThird

defensive.name: ballRecovery
defensive.description: When a player takes possession of a loose ball, or switch of possession between teams when the ball is in open play

defensive.name: attemptsConcededIbox
defensive.description: An attempt conceded from a shot from inside the box

defensive.name: attemptsConcededObox
defensive.description: An attempt conceded from a shot from outside the box

defensive.name: ppda
defensive.description: Measures how many opposition passes a team allows before making a defensive action, indicating pressing intensity—lower values mean stronger pressing. Note: Calculation formula = opposition_passes / defensive_actions

defensive.name: fkFoulLost
defensive.description: All fouls by individual players, essentially counting all free kicks lost. It could be described as fouls conceded, fouls committed or free kicks conceded, they are practically equivalent (include penalties, and handballs)

defensive.name: challengeLost
defensive.description: Challenge that did not make contact, i.e. a missed challenge where the player was dribbled past (therefore, there cannot be a 'challengeWon' metric)

defensive.name: defensiveActions
defensive.description: Number of defensive moves made by the team in the defensive third

general.description: The number of times a player did not play in a match.

general.description: The number of times the scored ended even for both teams in a match and there was no extra time.

general.description: The number of fouls comitted by a player or team.

general.description: The difference of goals scored and goals conceded.

general.description: The percentage of matches won.

general.name: wonCorners
general.description: The number of corners won.

general.name: yellowCards
general.description: The number of yellow cards accumulated.

general.name: aerialsLost
general.description: Total number of duels where the ball is in the air and possession is lost

general.name: aerialsWon
general.description: Total number of duels where the ball is in the air and possession is won

general.name: duelsLost
general.description: Total number of duels over the possession of the ball where a player loses the ball - doesn't include 'overrun' situations where the attacking player takes on an opponent but the ball runs away from them out of play or to an opponent.

general.name: duelsWon
general.description: Total number of duels for possession of the ball where possession was won (aerial won + ground duels won)

general.name: groundDuelsWon
general.description: Total number of duels where possession is won and ball is on the ground; including total contests, total tackles, fouls, being fouled, dispossessions and lost challenges.

general.name: duels
general.description: Total number of direct player-on-player confrontations for possession of the ball (aerial + ground duels)

general.name: groundDuels
general.description: Total number of duels over possession where ball is on the ground; including total contests, total tackles, fouls, being fouled, dispossessions and lost challenges - doesn't include 'overrun' situations where the attacking player takes on an opponent but the ball runs away from them out of play or to an opponent.

general.name: duelWinPct
general.description: The percentage of duels won.

general.name: wonContest
general.description: Total dribbles where a team player beats an opponent – no over-runs or defensive 1v1s

general.name: totalContest
general.description: A dribble past a player is attempted (contests always involve two players) – it does not include 'overrun' situations (where the attacking player takes on an opponent, but the ball runs away from them and then out of play or to an opponent) or 'defensive 1v1' situations (where the attacking player attempts a dribble but is stopped by the defender but without a tackle occurring)

general.name: touches
general.description: Total sum of a player's or team's on-the-ball events

general.name: aerialDuelPct
general.description: Percentage of aerial duels won against total contested duels.

offensive.name: unsuccessfulTouch

defensive.name: ppda
defensive.description: Measures how many opposition passes a team allows before making a defensive action, indicating pressing intensity—lower values mean stronger pressing. Note: Calculation formula = opposition_passes / defensive_actions

defensive.name: fkFoulLost
defensive.description: All fouls by individual players, essentially counting all free kicks lost. It could be described as fouls conceded, fouls committed or free kicks conceded, they are practically equivalent (include penalties, and handballs)

defensive.name: challengeLost
defensive.description: Challenge that did not make contact, i.e. a missed challenge where the player was dribbled past (therefore, there cannot be a 'challengeWon' metric)

defensive.name: defensiveActions
defensive.description: Number of defensive moves made by the team in the defensive third

general.name: appearances

general.name: dnp

general.name: goalDifference
general.description: The difference of goals scored and goals conceded.

general.description: The percentage of passes that result in the ball finding its target.

general.name: duelsLost
general.description: Total number of duels over the possession of the ball where a player loses the ball - doesn't include 'overrun' situations where the attacking player takes on an opponent but the ball runs away from them out of play or to an opponent.

general.name: duelsWon
general.description: Total number of duels for possession of the ball where possession was won (aerial won + ground duels won)

general.name: groundDuelsWon
general.description: Total number of duels where possession is won and ball is on the ground; including total contests, total tackles, fouls, being fouled, dispossessions and lost challenges.

general.name: duels
general.description: Total number of direct player-on-player confrontations for possession of the ball (aerial + ground duels)

general.name: groundDuels
general.description: Total number of duels over possession where ball is on the ground; including total contests, total tackles, fouls, being fouled, dispossessions and lost challenges - doesn't include 'overrun' situations where the attacking player takes on an opponent but the ball runs away from them out of play or to an opponent.

general.name: duelWinPct
general.description: The percentage of duels won.

general.name: wonContest
general.description: Total dribbles where a team player beats an opponent – no over-runs or defensive 1v1s

general.name: totalContest
general.description: A dribble past a player is attempted (contests always involve two players) – it does not include 'overrun' situations (where the attacking player takes on an opponent, but the ball runs away from them and then out of play or to an opponent) or 'defensive 1v1' situations (where the attacking player attempts a dribble but is stopped by the defender but without a tackle occurring)

general.name: touches
general.description: Total sum of a player's or team's on-the-ball events

general.name: aerialDuelPct
general.description: Percentage of aerial duels won against total contested duels.

defensive.name: inneffectiveTackles
defensive.description: The number of tackles where the player doesn't win the ball.

defensive.name: interceptions
defensive.description: The number of interceptions.

defensive.name: tacklePct
defensive.description: The perencentage of tackles where the player wins the ball.

defensive.name: totalClearance
defensive.description: The number of clearances attempted.

defensive.name: totalTackles
defensive.description: The number of tackles attempted.

defensive.name: possWonAtt3rd
defensive.description: Total number of times possession was regained in the attacking third of the field

defensive.name: possWonDef3rd
defensive.description: Total number of times possession was regained in the defensive third of the field

defensive.name: possWonMid3rd
defensive.description: Total number of times possession was regained in the midfield third of the field

defensive.name: ballRecovery
defensive.description: When a player takes possession of a loose ball, or switch of possession between teams when the ball is in open play

defensive.name: attemptsConcededIbox
defensive.description: An attempt conceded from a shot from inside the box

defensive.name: attemptsConcededObox
defensive.description: An attempt conceded from a shot from outside the box

defensive.name: goalsConcededIbox
defensive.description: Goal conceded from a shot inside the box

defensive.name: ppda
defensive.description: Measures how many opposition passes a team allows before making a defensive action, indicating pressing intensity—lower values mean stronger pressing. Note: Calculation formula = opposition_passes / defensive_actions

defensive.name: fkFoulLost
defensive.description: All fouls by individual players, essentially counting all free kicks lost. It could be described as fouls conceded, fouls committed or free kicks conceded, they are practically equivalent (include penalties, and handballs)

defensive.name: challengeLost
defensive.description: Challenge that did not make contact, i.e. a missed challenge where the player was dribbled past (therefore, there cannot be a 'challengeWon' metric)

defensive.name: defensiveActions
defensive.description: Number of defensive moves made by the team in the defensive third

general.name: appearances
general.description: The number of times a player has made an appearance in a match.

general.name: avgRatingFromCorrespondent
general.description: The rating from a correspondent for a player.

general.name: avgRatingFromDataFeed
general.description: The rating from the data feed for a player.

general.name: avgRatingFromEditor
general.description: The rating from the editor(s) for a player.

general.name: avgRatingFromUser
general.description: The average user rating for a player.

general.name: dnp
general.description: The number of times a player did not play in a match.

general.name: draws
general.description: The number of times the scored ended even for both teams in a match and there was no extra time.

general.name: foulsCommitted
general.description: The number of fouls comitted by a player or team.

general.name: foulsSuffered
general.description: The number of fouls suffered by a player or team.

general.name: goalDifference
general.description: The difference of goals scored and goals conceded.

general.name: handBalls
general.description: The number of handball fouls committed..

general.name: losses
general.description: The number of times a team has lost a match.

general.name: lostCorners
general.description: The number of corners conceded to the opposing team.

general.name: minutes
general.description: The number of minutes played by a player.

general.name: ownGoals
general.description: The number of own goals conceded.

general.name: passPct
general.description: The percentage of passes that result in the ball finding its target.

general.name: redCards
general.description: The number of red cards that have been issued.

general.name: starts
general.description: The number of starts a player has made in matches.

general.name: subIns
general.description: The number of times a player has come on a sub in a match.

general.name: subOuts
general.description: The number of times a player has been subbed off in a match.

general.name: suspensions
general.description: The number of matches a player has been suspended.

general.name: timeEnded
general.description: The time a match ends.

general.name: timeStarted
general.description: The time a match starts.

general.name: winPct
general.description: The percentage of matches won.

general.name: wins
general.description: The number of matches won.

general.name: wonCorners
general.description: The number of corners won.

general.name: yellowCards
general.description: The number of yellow cards accumulated.

general.name: aerialsLost
general.description: Total number of duels where the ball is in the air and possession is lost

general.name: aerialsWon
general.description: Total number of duels where the ball is in the air and possession is won

general.name: duelsLost
general.description: Total number of duels over the possession of the ball where a player loses the ball - doesn't include 'overrun' situations where the attacking player takes on an opponent but the ball runs away from them out of play or to an opponent.

general.name: duelsWon
general.description: Total number of duels for possession of the ball where possession was won (aerial won + ground duels won)

general.name: groundDuelsWon
general.description: Total number of duels where possession is won and ball is on the ground; including total contests, total tackles, fouls, being fouled, dispossessions and lost challenges.

general.name: duels
general.description: Total number of direct player-on-player confrontations for possession of the ball (aerial + ground duels)

general.name: groundDuels
general.description: Total number of duels over possession where ball is on the ground; including total contests, total tackles, fouls, being fouled, dispossessions and lost challenges - doesn't include 'overrun' situations where the attacking player takes on an opponent but the ball runs away from them out of play or to an opponent.

general.name: duelWinPct
general.description: The percentage of duels won.

general.name: wonContest
general.description: Total dribbles where a team player beats an opponent – no over-runs or defensive 1v1s

general.name: totalContest
general.description: A dribble past a player is attempted (contests always involve two players) – it does not include 'overrun' situations (where the attacking player takes on an opponent, but the ball runs away from them and then out of play or to an opponent) or 'defensive 1v1' situations (where the attacking player attempts a dribble but is stopped by the defender but without a tackle occurring)

general.name: touches
general.description: Total sum of a player's or team's on-the-ball events

general.name: aerialDuelPct
general.description: Percentage of aerial duels won against total contested duels.

offensive.description: The percentage of through balls played that find their target.

offensive.name: finalThirdEntries
offensive.description: A pass where the ball moves from outside the final third into the final third

offensive.name: penAreaEntries
offensive.description: A pass where the ball moves from outside to inside the penalty area

offensive.name: successfulFinalThirdPasses
offensive.description: Total number of successful passes where the ball ends in the final third of the pitch (excludes throw-ins, keeper throws, and crosses)

offensive.name: totalFinalThirdPasses
offensive.description: Total number of passes (successful or unsuccessful) where ball ends in the final third of the pitch (excludes throw-ins, keeper throws, and crosses)

offensive.name: touchesInOppBox
offensive.description: Total touches inside the penalty area of the opposition

offensive.name: attemptsIbox
offensive.description: An attempted shot from inside the box

offensive.name: dispossessed
offensive.description: A player in possession gets tackled by an opposition player when they are not attempting to dribble past (attempted take on) an opposition player.

offensive.name: unsuccessfulTouch
offensive.description: A player only touched the ball and lost possession – bad control

offensive.name: fouledFinalThird
offensive.description: A foul that occurs in the final third of the pitch (in relation to the attacking player's final third, ie attacking third)

offensive.name: accurateThrows
offensive.description: All accurate throw-ins

offensive.name: totalThrows
offensive.description: Total number of throw-ins

offensive.name: totalBackZonePass
offensive.description: Total number of passes that end in the player's own half – excluding throw-ins and keeper throws

offensive.name: totalFwdZonePass
offensive.description: Total number of passes that end in the opposition half (includes crosses).

defensive.name: blockedShots
defensive.description: The number shots blocked by a defender.

defensive.name: effectiveClearance
defensive.description: The number of clearances that stops the attack of the opposing team.

defensive.name: effectiveTackles
defensive.description: The number of tackles where the player wins the ball.

defensive.name: inneffectiveTackles
defensive.description: The number of tackles where the player doesn't win the ball.

defensive.name: interceptions
defensive.description: The number of interceptions.

defensive.name: tacklePct
defensive.description: The perencentage of tackles where the player wins the ball.

defensive.name: totalClearance
defensive.description: The number of clearances attempted.

defensive.name: totalTackles
defensive.description: The number of tackles attempted.

defensive.name: possWonDef3rd
defensive.description: Total number of times possession was regained in the defensive third of the field

defensive.name: possWonMid3rd
defensive.description: Total number of times possession was regained in the midfield third of the field

defensive.name: ballRecovery
defensive.description: When a player takes possession of a loose ball, or switch of possession between teams when the ball is in open play

defensive.name: attemptsConcededIbox
defensive.description: An attempt conceded from a shot from inside the box

defensive.name: goalsConcededIbox
defensive.description: Goal conceded from a shot inside the box

defensive.name: ppda
defensive.description: Measures how many opposition passes a team allows before making a defensive action, indicating pressing intensity—lower values mean stronger pressing. Note: Calculation formula = opposition_passes / defensive_actions

defensive.name: fkFoulLost
defensive.description: All fouls by individual players, essentially counting all free kicks lost. It could be described as fouls conceded, fouls committed or free kicks conceded, they are practically equivalent (include penalties, and handballs)

defensive.name: challengeLost
defensive.description: Challenge that did not make contact, i.e. a missed challenge where the player was dribbled past (therefore, there cannot be a 'challengeWon' metric)

defensive.name: defensiveActions
defensive.description: Number of defensive moves made by the team in the defensive third

general.name: appearances
general.description: The number of times a player has made an appearance in a match.

general.name: avgRatingFromCorrespondent
general.description: The rating from a correspondent for a player.

general.name: avgRatingFromDataFeed
general.description: The rating from the data feed for a player.

general.name: avgRatingFromEditor
general.description: The rating from the editor(s) for a player.

general.name: avgRatingFromUser
general.description: The average user rating for a player.

general.name: dnp
general.description: The number of times a player did not play in a match.

general.name: draws
general.description: The number of times the scored ended even for both teams in a match and there was no extra time.

general.name: foulsCommitted
general.description: The number of fouls comitted by a player or team.

general.name: foulsSuffered
general.description: The number of fouls suffered by a player or team.

general.name: goalDifference
general.description: The difference of goals scored and goals conceded.

general.name: handBalls
general.description: The number of handball fouls committed..

general.name: losses
general.description: The number of times a team has lost a match.

general.name: lostCorners
general.description: The number of corners conceded to the opposing team.

general.name: minutes
general.description: The number of minutes played by a player.

general.name: ownGoals
general.description: The number of own goals conceded.

general.name: passPct
general.description: The percentage of passes that result in the ball finding its target.

general.name: redCards
general.description: The number of red cards that have been issued.

general.name: starts
general.description: The number of starts a player has made in matches.

general.name: subIns
general.description: The number of times a player has come on a sub in a match.

general.name: subOuts
general.description: The number of times a player has been subbed off in a match.

general.name: suspensions
general.description: The number of matches a player has been suspended.

general.name: timeEnded
general.description: The time a match ends.

general.name: timeStarted
general.description: The time a match starts.

general.name: winPct
general.description: The percentage of matches won.

general.name: wins
general.description: The number of matches won.

general.name: wonCorners
general.description: The number of corners won.

general.name: yellowCards
general.description: The number of yellow cards accumulated.

general.name: aerialsLost
general.description: Total number of duels where the ball is in the air and possession is lost

general.name: aerialsWon
general.description: Total number of duels where the ball is in the air and possession is won

general.name: duelsLost
general.description: Total number of duels over the possession of the ball where a player loses the ball - doesn't include 'overrun' situations where the attacking player takes on an opponent but the ball runs away from them out of play or to an opponent.

general.name: duelsWon
general.description: Total number of duels for possession of the ball where possession was won (aerial won + ground duels won)

general.name: groundDuelsWon
general.description: Total number of duels where possession is won and ball is on the ground; including total contests, total tackles, fouls, being fouled, dispossessions and lost challenges.

general.name: duels
general.description: Total number of direct player-on-player confrontations for possession of the ball (aerial + ground duels)

general.name: groundDuels
general.description: Total number of duels over possession where ball is on the ground; including total contests, total tackles, fouls, being fouled, dispossessions and lost challenges - doesn't include 'overrun' situations where the attacking player takes on an opponent but the ball runs away from them out of play or to an opponent.

general.name: duelWinPct
general.description: The percentage of duels won.

general.name: wonContest
general.description: Total dribbles where a team player beats an opponent – no over-runs or defensive 1v1s

general.name: totalContest
general.description: A dribble past a player is attempted (contests always involve two players) – it does not include 'overrun' situations (where the attacking player takes on an opponent, but the ball runs away from them and then out of play or to an opponent) or 'defensive 1v1' situations (where the attacking player attempts a dribble but is stopped by the defender but without a tackle occurring)

general.name: touches
general.description: Total sum of a player's or team's on-the-ball events

general.name: aerialDuelPct
general.description: Percentage of aerial duels won against total contested duels.

offensive.name: successfulFinalThirdPasses

offensive.name: unsuccessfulTouch

offensive.name: fouledFinalThird

defensive.name: blockedShots

defensive.description: Total number of times possession was regained in the defensive third of the field

defensive.name: possWonMid3rd
defensive.description: Total number of times possession was regained in the midfield third of the field

defensive.name: ballRecovery
defensive.description: When a player takes possession of a loose ball, or switch of possession between teams when the ball is in open play

defensive.name: attemptsConcededIbox
defensive.description: An attempt conceded from a shot from inside the box

defensive.name: attemptsConcededObox
defensive.description: An attempt conceded from a shot from outside the box

defensive.name: goalsConcededIbox
defensive.description: Goal conceded from a shot inside the box

defensive.name: ppda
defensive.description: Measures how many opposition passes a team allows before making a defensive action, indicating pressing intensity—lower values mean stronger pressing. Note: Calculation formula = opposition_passes / defensive_actions

defensive.name: fkFoulLost
defensive.description: All fouls by individual players, essentially counting all free kicks lost. It could be described as fouls conceded, fouls committed or free kicks conceded, they are practically equivalent (include penalties, and handballs)

defensive.name: challengeLost
defensive.description: Challenge that did not make contact, i.e. a missed challenge where the player was dribbled past (therefore, there cannot be a 'challengeWon' metric)

defensive.name: defensiveActions
defensive.description: Number of defensive moves made by the team in the defensive third

general.name: appearances
general.description: The number of times a player has made an appearance in a match.

general.name: avgRatingFromCorrespondent
general.description: The rating from a correspondent for a player.

general.name: avgRatingFromDataFeed
general.description: The rating from the data feed for a player.

general.description: The rating from the editor(s) for a player.

general.name: avgRatingFromUser
general.description: The average user rating for a player.

general.name: dnp
general.description: The number of times a player did not play in a match.

general.name: draws
general.description: The number of times the scored ended even for both teams in a match and there was no extra time.

general.name: foulsCommitted
general.description: The number of fouls comitted by a player or team.

general.name: foulsSuffered
general.description: The number of fouls suffered by a player or team.

general.name: goalDifference
general.description: The difference of goals scored and goals conceded.

general.description: The number of times a team has lost a match.

general.description: The number of corners conceded to the opposing team.

general.description: The number of minutes played by a player.

general.name: ownGoals
general.description: The number of own goals conceded.

general.description: The percentage of passes that result in the ball finding its target.

general.description: The number of red cards that have been issued.

general.description: The number of starts a player has made in matches.

general.description: The number of times a player has come on a sub in a match.
